name: Straight-Cut Kurta
description: Lightweight straight-cut kurta in soft cotton with subtle block print at the hem and cuffs. Suitable for casual, office, and everyday wear.

name: A-Line Embroidered Kurta
description: Flared A-line kurta with intricate thread embroidery at the neckline and border. Made from fine chanderi fabric.

name: Angrakha Style Kurta
description: Traditional Angrakha wrap-style kurta with asymmetric overlap, side ties, and 3/4 sleeves in rich jewel-tone georgette.

name: Printed Kurti Top
description: Short kurti top in vibrant digital print on rayon. V-neckline, 3/4 sleeves, and a straight hem — easy to pair with jeans or palazzos.

name: Silk Kurta with Zari Border
description: Luxe pure silk kurta with a golden zari woven border. Straight-cut with a round neckline and three-quarter sleeves. Ideal for festivals.

name: Salwar Kameez Set
description: Classic salwar kameez in cotton with a printed kameez, straight salwar, and matching dupatta. Comfortable and elegant for daily wear.

name: Palazzo Salwar Set
description: Elegant palazzo salwar set with a long flared kurta and wide-leg palazzo pants in georgette with minimal embroidery.

name: Pant Salwar Set
description: Contemporary pant-style salwar set with a long A-line kurta and slim tapered trousers. Chanderi top with printed hem.

name: Designer Sharara Set
description: Stunning sharara set with a cropped kurta top and heavily flared sharara pants with zari embroidery. Perfect for weddings and functions.

name: Cotton Block Print Dupatta
description: Hand block-printed cotton dupatta with tassel fringe ends. A versatile accessory to complement any ethnic ensemble.

name: Embroidered Silk Dupatta
description: Luxurious silk dupatta with intricate phulkari embroidery and a scalloped border. Makes a statement on any ethnic outfit.

name: Bandhani Dupatta
description: Beautiful hand-tied bandhani dupatta in vibrant colours with gold border. Lightweight chiffon fabric.

name: Bridal Lehenga Set
description: Opulent bridal lehenga with heavy zardozi embroidered choli, flared skirt with 6m sweep, and matching dupatta.

name: Party Lehenga Set
description: Festive lehenga with a sequin-embellished blouse, semi-stitched flared skirt, and organza dupatta for sangeet and parties.

name: Indo-Western Lehenga
description: Contemporary Indo-Western lehenga with a crop jacket blouse, A-line skirt with minimal embroidery, and no dupatta.

name: Classic Oxford Shirt
description: Timeless Oxford button-down shirt in 100% cotton with a chest pocket and single-button cuffs. Ideal for smart casual and business casual.

name: Linen Resort Shirt
description: Relaxed linen shirt with a camp collar and short sleeves. Breathable and lightweight, perfect for vacations and summer weekends.

name: Printed Casual Shirt
description: Fun printed casual shirt with all-over tropical or abstract print. Relaxed fit, camp collar, and a straight hem.

name: Formal Dress Shirt
description: Slim-fit formal dress shirt with a spread collar, French cuffs, and a hidden button placket. Perfect with suits and ties.

name: Flannel Check Shirt
description: Warm brushed flannel shirt in classic windowpane check. Relaxed fit with a button-down collar and chest pockets.

name: Slim Fit Chinos
description: Clean-lined slim-fit chinos in stretch cotton twill. Mid-rise waist, on-seam pockets, and a tapered leg.

name: Regular Fit Formal Trousers
description: Classic regular-fit formal trousers in structured fabric with a flat front and pressed crease. Essential for business wear.

name: Relaxed Linen Trousers
description: Easy-fitting linen trousers with a drawstring waist and side pockets. Lightweight and breathable for warm weather.

name: Men's Cargo Trousers
description: Rugged cargo trousers with multiple utility pockets, a relaxed fit, and a drawstring waist.

name: Men's Slim Fit Jeans
description: Classic slim-fit jeans in rigid denim with a mid-rise waist, five-pocket design, and a slight taper to the ankle.

name: Formal Suit Blazer
description: Part of PRD-101/PRD-102. Slim-fit single-breasted blazer in Italian wool blend with notched lapels and two-button closure.

name: Formal Suit Trousers
description: Part of PRD-101/PRD-102. Matching slim-fit flat-front suit trousers with pressed crease and side tabs.

name: Linen Suit Blazer
description: Part of PRD-103/PRD-104. Relaxed unstructured linen blazer with patch pockets and natural drape. Great for summer events.

name: Linen Suit Trousers
description: Part of PRD-103/PRD-104. Relaxed straight-cut linen trousers with elasticated waist and patch pockets.

name: Check Blazer
description: Statement-making slim-fit check blazer. Pair with solid trousers for a sharp contrast.

name: Men's Polo T-Shirt
description: Piqué cotton polo with a ribbed collar, two-button placket, and a side-vent hem.

name: Graphic Oversized Tee — Men
description: Boxy oversized T-shirt with a large graphic print at the chest or back. 100% cotton jersey with dropped shoulders.

name: Striped Cotton T-Shirt — Men
description: Classic crew-neck striped tee in a soft cotton-modal blend. Slim fit with a comfortable stretch.

name: Henley T-Shirt
description: Long-sleeve Henley tee with a three-button placket and a relaxed fit in soft heavyweight jersey.

name: Men's Slim Kurta
description: Sleek slim-fit kurta in soft cotton with a mandarin collar and minimal pintuck detailing.

name: Nehru Jacket
description: Classic Nehru jacket in brocade fabric with a mandarin collar and a single-button closure. Wear over a kurta or a plain shirt.

name: Sherwani Set
description: Premium sherwani set with embroidery on the kurta, matching churidar, and stole. For grooms and wedding functions.

name: Men's Performance Jogger
description: Performance joggers in moisture-wicking stretch fabric with a tapered fit, side pockets, and reflective detailing.

name: Men's Training Shorts
description: Lightweight training shorts with a 7-inch inseam, built-in brief, and side zip pockets for gym and running.

name: Men's Zip Hoodie
description: Heavyweight French terry full-zip hoodie with a kangaroo pocket and ribbed waistband.

name: Men's Crewneck Sweatshirt
description: Classic crewneck sweatshirt in brushed fleece with ribbed cuffs and hem.

name: Men's Cable Knit Sweater
description: Cable-knit wool-blend crew neck sweater with rollneck. Warm and textured, essential for winter dressing.

name: Men's Bomber Jacket
description: Classic bomber jacket in a smooth satin shell with rib-knit collar, cuffs, and hem. Lightweight and versatile.

name: Men's Denim Jacket
description: Classic rigid denim trucker jacket with chest pockets and a button-front closure.

name: Men's Kurta Pyjama Set
description: Easy kurta-pyjama set in breathable cotton. Straight-cut long kurta with matching straight-leg pyjama.

name: Men's Swim Shorts
description: Quick-dry swim shorts with an elastic waistband, drawstring, side pockets, and a mesh lining.

name: Men's Puffer Jacket
description: Lightweight packable puffer jacket with down-fill insulation, stand collar, and two-way zip. Packs into its own pocket.

name: Men's Vintage Wash Tee
description: Soft garment-dyed relaxed-fit tee with a washed-out vintage feel. Crew neck with slightly longer back hem.

name: Men's Straight Fit Chinos
description: Relaxed straight-fit chinos in durable cotton blend. Versatile for weekdays and weekends with on-seam pockets.

name: Men's Formal Waistcoat
description: Classic five-button formal waistcoat with welt pockets and an adjustable back strap.

name: Men's Mandarin Collar Shirt
description: Minimalist mandarin collar shirt in premium cotton poplin. A modern alternative to traditional dress shirts.

name: Men's Tracksuit Top
description: Part of PRD-127/PRD-128. Quarter-zip track top in moisture-wicking fabric with thumb holes and zippered chest pocket.

name: Men's Tracksuit Bottoms
description: Part of PRD-127/PRD-128. Tapered track pants in matching moisture-wicking fabric with zip pockets and drawstring waist.

name: Men's Silk Blend Kurta
description: Elegant silk-blend kurta with subtle texture and a V-neck with piping. Wear with churidar for festive occasions.

name: Men's Casual Linen Shorts
description: Relaxed linen shorts with a pull-on elasticated waist and two side pockets. Ideal for beach days and weekend outings.

name: Men's Reversible Jacket
description: Versatile reversible jacket — solid on one side, printed on the other. Lightweight nylon shell with a relaxed fit.

name: Day Wedding Sherwani
description: Light cotton-silk blend sherwani perfect for day wedding functions. Minimal resham embroidery, bandhgala collar.

name: Men's Long Sleeve Linen Shirt
description: Easy long-sleeve linen shirt with spread collar and button-through front. Great for layering or wearing open over a tee.

name: Men's Flannel Overshirt
description: Heavyweight flannel overshirt worn as a jacket. Relaxed fit, chest and hip pockets, and button front.

name: Cotton Vest Undershirt 2-Pack
description: Pack of 2 pure cotton round-neck vests in fine ribbed fabric for stretch and breathability.

name: Men's Barrel Fit Jeans
description: Barrel-fit relaxed jeans with high-rise, wide thigh, and slightly tapered ankle — a contemporary 90s silhouette.

name: Men's Merino Turtleneck
description: Soft merino wool turtleneck with a slim fit and extra-fine gauge. Lightweight enough to layer under a blazer.

name: Men's Patterned Socks 3-Pack
description: Set of 3 pairs of combed cotton socks in assorted playful patterns — stripes, polka dots, and geometric.

name: Men's Leather Belt
description: Full-grain leather dress belt with a polished silver or gold pin buckle. Width: 35mm. Fits waist 28–42 inches.

name: Men's Silk Pocket Square
description: Silk pocket square in a handmade print, 30×30cm. Adds colour and texture to any suit or blazer.

name: Men's Formal Silk Tie
description: Pure silk formal tie in a classic width and woven pattern. Interlined for structure and a perfect dimple.

name: Men's Sneaker Loafer
description: Slip-on loafer with a sneaker-style sole for comfort. Leather upper with a penny loafer detail.

name: Men's Running Sneaker
description: High-performance running sneaker with mesh upper, cushioned midsole, and durable rubber outsole. Lightweight at 280g.

name: Men's Classic White Sneaker
description: Timeless all-white leather sneaker with a low profile, clean toe box, and a vulcanised rubber sole.

name: Men's Oxford Shoes
description: Full-brogue Oxford in polished leather with leather sole and heel. A classic of formal footwear.

name: Men's Chelsea Boots
description: Sleek suede Chelsea boot with elastic gusset panels and a stacked heel. Pairs well with chinos and slim trousers.

name: Women's Silk Festive Kurta
description: Pure silk festive kurta with boat neckline and hand-embroidered neckline detailing. A premium ethnic piece.

name: Embroidered Anarkali
description: Long flared Anarkali kurta with thread and mirror embroidery on the yoke. Pairs with churidar and dupatta.

name: Handloom Cotton Kurta
description: Sustainably woven handloom cotton kurta with natural texture and earthy tones. Straight cut with side slits and a boat neck.

name: Ikat Print Palazzo Set
description: Vibrant ikat-print palazzo set with a tunic-length kurta and matching wide-leg palazzo pants. A festive-casual staple.
